title: celtis zizyphoides
intro: Celtis zizyphoides, also known as the Chinese elm or Desert date, is a species of deciduous tree in the family Cannabaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and protect against oxidative stress. The health benefits of Celtis zizyphoides include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and support digestive health. Celtis zizyphoides can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, or used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of ailments.
